metrics.method: false_positives / (false_positives + true_negatives) over held-out anomaly-negative cells (includes suppressed data-quality case, which must not alert)
metrics.limitations: Synthetic held-out data only; small sample; single anomaly rule (near_identical_amounts). Not production evidence.

metrics.method: true_positives / (true_positives + false_positives) over held-out (scenario x provider) anomaly cells; alertable = requires_review flag
metrics.limitations: Synthetic held-out data only; small sample; single anomaly rule (near_identical_amounts). Not production evidence.

metrics.method: true_positives / (true_positives + false_negatives) over held-out labelled anomaly cells
metrics.limitations: Synthetic held-out data only; small sample; single anomaly rule (near_identical_amounts). Not production evidence.

metrics.method: projected_shortage_at - as_of_at for the held-out Scenario A shared-cash liquidity projection
metrics.limitations: Single held-out shortage on synthetic data; lead time reflects the seeded depletion slope, not real-world demand.

metrics.method: in-process handler timing over 30 iterations x 3 read endpoints (outlet_dashboard, liquidity_projections, anomaly_flags); excludes network/serialization transport
metrics.limitations: In-process timing on a single connection; not a networked load test.

metrics.method: in-process handler timing over 30 iterations x 3 read endpoints (outlet_dashboard, liquidity_projections, anomaly_flags); excludes network/serialization transport
metrics.limitations: In-process timing on a single connection; not a networked load test.

metrics.method: published high-impact alerts whose EN explanation has all sections (situation, evidence, uncertainty, next_step) / total published high-impact alerts
metrics.limitations: Held-out published alerts only; completeness checks non-empty text, not quality.

metrics.method: provider feed assessments with status in {stale,missing,conflicting} / total provider assessments across held-out runs
metrics.limitations: Synthetic feeds; incidents are seeded via Scenario C fault injection.
